schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: HRVDex per-measurement HRV (Welltory-style) → Ganglior events. tMs = floating wall-clock ms (UTC getters). null = unknown, never fabricated. stress_high derives from a vendor black-box composite (meta.derived:true, heuristic tier).

reserved.doc: Awaiting other fleet nodes; null until available.
